name: epi
description: Search and rank engineering papers for an EPI wiki.

interface.shortDescription: Dry-run search, filter, and rank engineering papers before parsing and wiki promotion.
interface.longDescription: EPI (Engineering Paper Intelligence) packages a Codex workflow for configurable paper discovery in robotics, AI, embodied intelligence, and control. It wraps mature paper-search MCP infrastructure, preserves raw run artifacts, initializes a dedicated paper research wiki, and keeps MinerU parsing as an internal stage for future parse runs.
